failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS publication_id
FROM publication p
JOIN profile pr ON p.profile_id = pr.id
WHERE
  p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'pasta')
  AND (
    pr.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'balneario & camboriu')
    OR p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'balneario & camboriu')
  )
ORDER BY p.published_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error: Query executed successfully but returned 0 rows — the filter may be too restrictive. Consider: OR instead of AND between separate concepts, dropping an overly specific constraint, or a broader tsquery.

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS publication_id
FROM publication p
JOIN profile pr ON p.profile_id = pr.id
WHERE
  (p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'pasta | macarrao | tagliatelle | spaghetti | lasanha'))

    OR p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('portuguese', 'balneario | camboriu')

ORDER BY p.published_at DESC
LIMIT 10;

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS publication_id
FROM publication p
JOIN profile pr ON p.profile_id = pr.id
WHERE
  (
    p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'pasta | noodle | spaghetti | lasagne | macaroni')
    OR p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('portuguese', 'pasta | macarrao | espaguete | lasanha')
  )
  AND (
    pr.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('portuguese', 'balneario | camboriu')
    OR pr.full_name ILIKE '%Balneário Camboriú%'
    OR p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('portuguese', 'balneario | camboriu')
  )
ORDER BY p.published_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error: Query executed successfully but returned 0 rows — the filter may be too restrictive. Consider: OR instead of AND between separate concepts, dropping an overly specific constraint, or a broader tsquery.

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS publication_id
FROM publication p
JOIN profile pr ON p.profile_id = pr.id
WHERE
  (
    p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('portuguese', 'pasta | macarrao | espaguete | lasanha | fettuccine | nhoque')
    OR p.description ILIKE '%pasta%'
    OR p.description ILIKE '%macarrão%'
    OR p.description ILIKE '%espaguete%'
    OR p.description ILIKE '%lasanha%'
  )
  AND (
    pr.biography ILIKE '%Balneário Camboriú%'
    OR pr.biography ILIKE '%BC%'
    OR pr.full_name ILIKE '%Balneário Camboriú%'
    OR p.description ILIKE '%Balneário Camboriú%'
    OR p.description ILIKE '%BC%'
  )
ORDER BY p.published_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error: Query executed successfully but returned 0 rows — the filter may be too restrictive. Consider: OR instead of AND between separate concepts, dropping an overly specific constraint, or a broader tsquery.
